description: 17. Get information about a user that was assigned to an application
name: okta-get-application-assignments

outputs.description: Alternative ID of actor. Okta.Logs.Events.actor.displayName Display name of actor.
outputs.name: Okta.Logs.Events.actor.alternateId

outputs.description: ID of actor. Okta.Logs.Events.client.userAgent.rawUserAgent A raw string representation of the user agent, formatted according to section 5.5.3 of HTTP/1.1 Semantics and Content. Both the browser and the OS fields can be derived from this field.
outputs.name: Okta.Logs.Events.actor.id

outputs.description: The Operating System the client runs on (for example, Windows 10). Okta.Logs.Events.client.userAgent.browser If the client is a web browser, this field identifies the type of web browser (for example, CHROME, FIREFOX).
outputs.name: Okta.Logs.Events.client.userAgent.os

outputs.description: The type of device that the client operated from (for example, Computer). Okta.Logs.Events.client.id For OAuth requests this is the ID of the requesting OAuth client.
outputs.name: Okta.Logs.Events.client.device

outputs.description: Okta.Logs.Events.client.ipAddress IP address that the client made the request from. Okta.Logs.Events.client.geographicalContext.city
outputs.name: For SSWS token requests, this is the ID of the requesting agent.

outputs.description: The city encompassing the area containing the geolocation coordinates, if available (for example, Seattle, San Francisco)
outputs.name: string

outputs.description: Full name of the state or province encompassing the area containing the geolocation coordinates (for example, Montana, Incheon).
outputs.name: Okta.Logs.Events.geographicalContext.state

outputs.description: Full name of the country encompassing the area containing the geolocation coordinates (for example, France, Uganda).
outputs.name: Okta.Logs.Events.client.geographicalContext.country

outputs.description: The display message for an event. Okta.Logs.Events.eventType The type of event that was published.
outputs.name: Okta.Logs.Events.displayMessage

outputs.description: Result of the action: SUCCESS FAILURE
outputs.name: Okta.Logs.Events.outcome.result

outputs.description: Okta.Logs.Events.outcome.reason Reason for the result (for example, INVALID_CREDENTIALS). Okta.Logs.Events.published
outputs.name: SKIPPED

outputs.description: Timestamp when the event was published. Okta.Logs.Events.severity Indicates how severe the event is:
outputs.name: string

outputs.description: INFO WARN ERROR
outputs.name: DEBUG

outputs.description: Autonomous system number associated with the autonomous system that the event request was sourced to. Okta.Logs.Events.securityContext.asOrg Organization associated with the autonomous system that the event request was sourced to.
outputs.name: Okta.Logs.Events.securityContext.asNumber

outputs.description: Internet service provider used to sent the event’s request. Okta.Logs.Events.securityContext.domain The domain name associated with the IP address of the inbound event request.
outputs.name: Okta.Logs.Events.securityContext.isp

outputs.description: Specifies whether an event’s request is from a known proxy. Okta.Logs.Events.request.ipChain.IP IP address.
outputs.name: Okta.Logs.Events.securityContext.isProxy

outputs.description: The city encompassing the area containing the geolocation coordinates, if available (for example, Seattle, San Francisco).
outputs.name: Okta.Logs.Events.request.ipChain.geographicalContext.city

outputs.description: Full name of the state or province encompassing the area containing the geolocation coordinates (for example, Montana, Incheon).
outputs.name: Okta.Logs.Events.request.ipChain.geographicalContext.state

outputs.description: Full name of the country encompassing the area containing the geolocation coordinates (for example, France, Uganda).
outputs.name: Okta.Logs.Events.request.ipChain.geographicalContext.country

outputs.description: Details regarding the source. Okta.Logs.Events.target.id Target ID.
outputs.name: Okta.Logs.Events.request.ipChain.source

outputs.description: Target type. Okta.Logs.Events.target.alternateId Alternative target ID.
outputs.name: Okta.Logs.Events.target.type

outputs.description: Display name of the target.
outputs.name: Okta.Logs.Events.target.displayName
